# CineSmithPro

> Save the hours. Make the cut. An AI editing companion for Adobe Premiere Pro, built for film, drama, documentary and podcast editors. AI does the heavy lifting; the editor stays in the creative seat. Coming soon — waitlist open.

CineSmithPro is a forthcoming product from CineArt AI Limited (London), a companion to CineSmith (cinesmith.io) — same company, separate product, separate brand expression. Designed for working editors in post-production, not the creator-economy YouTube cohort.

## The promise

- **Hours saved.** AI handles the scrubbing, the searching, the assembly. The editor handles the creative.
- **Transcripts come alive.** Read once; find anything inside Premiere afterwards.
- **Two licences per seat.** The editor cuts on Premiere while their EP or assistant pulls the next sequence on the web — both at once, one licence.
- **Much, much more.** Detailed feature list at general availability.

## Who it is for

- Documentary editors
- Drama series editors
- Podcast editors
- Post houses and studios

## Status

Pre-launch. Waitlist now open at https://cinesmithpro.com. First fifty working editors get prioritised access. Pricing and full feature list announced at launch.

## Operating company

CineArt AI Limited
85 Great Portland Street, London W1W 7LT
Registered in England and Wales
Press: press@cineartai.com · +44 7958 707232

- [CineSmith](https://cinesmith.io) — sister product, separate from this plugin
